name: x402-happy-path-wallet-fallback
description: Golden fixture: agent's first x402 attempt fails (facilitator timeout), SDK auto-mode falls back to wallet path, wallet has balance, capability executes successfully. Tests SDK mode='auto' graceful degradation per ADR-0003 decision E.
scenario: x402 facilitator slow → SDK auto-fallback → wallet path success

error.message: x402 facilitator at https://x402.org/facilitator did not respond within 5s; settlement aborted.

next_action.hint: x402 settlement is currently degraded. Top up the wallet to use the alternative payment method.

step_2_wallet_retry_by_sdk.note: SDK in mode='auto' observes the X402_SETTLEMENT_TIMEOUT, checks wallet balance > cost (sufficient), and automatically retries WITHOUT X-Payment.

postconditions: x402_settlements has NO row for this request_id (the x402 attempt aborted before /settle attestation)
wallet_transactions has one row with method='wallet', cost_usdc=0.20
billing.method on the second response is 'wallet', NOT 'x402'
no X-Payment-Response header on the wallet-path response (it's a wallet settlement, not x402)
